title: zollikoferiastrum brassicifolium
intro: Zollikoferiastrum brassicifolium, also known as the fossil plant Zollikoferiastrum brassicifolium, is a type of extinct plant species that was discovered in the Swiss Jura Mountains and dates back to the Early Cretaceous period, approximately 145 million years ago. Unfortunately, there is not enough information available about this plant's medicinal properties. However, I can tell you that the plant is considered to be a member of the extinct family Zollikoferiaceae.
